text:
NAME: CTZNSHP_VRFCTN_PENDG_IND 

LONG NAME: CTZNSHP_VRFCTN_PENDG_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = Citizenship verified (effective August 2021; previously was “No”) 
1 = Enrolled in Medicaid pending citizenship verification (effective August 2021; previously was “Yes”) 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: — 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
